_comment: A/B hero image specs for Bitmoji Lab. 1500×1500 Etsy thumbnails. Features: paint emojis on NeoPixel LED matrix via USB Web Serial, 100+ emojis, Magic Paintbrush, 8×8/16×16, 11 animated demos.
